calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: Q-045/MECH-313/MECH-260 + FP-2 dissociation on scaffolded_sd054_onboarding (re-issue of 603d on hook-fixed scheduler + z_goal_enabled config)
items.note: Substrate-readiness validation (EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic) of the 2026-06-02 implement-substrate AMEND (scaffolded_sd054_onboarding update_z_goal wiring, ree-v3 deb24cc). THREE changes vs 603d: (1) restored P0/P1=100/50 budget; (2) from_dims sets z_goal_enabled=True + drive_weight=2.0 (603d omitted it -> goal_state None -> update_z_goal early-returned); (3) bespoke P2 loop now calls update_z_goal each step. Acceptance: z_goal_norm_peak > 0.4 on >=2/3 seeds in P2 AND P1 survival gate passed on >=2/3 seeds. Forced-seed verification confirmed the 603e P2 path forms z_goal (peak 0.36 at 25 steps). claim_ids recorded as context (diagnostic; not governance-weighted).

items.title: MECH-341 within-class temperature 4-arm sweep -- corrected harness (committed-class metric + within-class diagnostics + cross-seed-mean C1; supersedes 614c)
items.note: CORRECTED-HARNESS re-run of the MECH-341 stratified_within_class_temperature validation. Supersedes V3-EXQ-614c, which RAN (12/12 cells, no crash) but was reclassified non_contributory for MECH-341 due to TWO test-harness defects (NOT substrate falsification; see failure_autopsy_V3-EXQ-614c_2026-06-01 + outstanding_tasks_triage_2026-06-02 item 3). Substrate config is BIT-IDENTICAL to 614c (SD-056-amended 4-substrate baseline: SP-CEM + MECH-341 entropy_bias_scale=2.0 + MECH-313 + V_s minimal + 5 SD-056 levers); the ONLY change is the measurement harness. Defect-1 fix (C2 was vacuous): 614c measured selected_class_entropy at the score-layer argmin(last_scores), temperature-INVARIANT to the within-class lever (the lever only changes the committed within-class representative inside stratified_select, when a class holds >=2 candidates) -> ARM_1/2/3 were bit-identical. 614d's C2 reads the COMMITTED-action class distribution (committed_class_entropy_nats) via a per-seed PAIRED lift over ARM_0_LEGACY (margin 0.05 nats, >=2/3 seeds), and records the lever's firing diagnostics per seed (mech341_n_within_class_sampled / mech341_n_stratified_fired / mech341_last_within_class_temperature) from agent.score_diversity.get_state() so a null result is readable as 'branch starved by env' vs 'branch active but no lift'. Defect-2 fix (C1 mis-specified): 614c required >=2/3 ARM_0 per-seed entropies IN the [0.720,0.880] band; ARM_0 cross-seed mean was 0.7999 (no regression) but 0/3 landed in band. 614d's C1 compares the ARM_0_LEGACY CROSS-SEED MEAN of selected_class_entropy (the 614b-equivalent metric) against the band. Acceptance: C1 ARM_LEGACY reproduces 614b ALL_ON 0.800 +/-10% (regression guard, cross-seed mean); C2 >=1 of {0.5,1.0,2.0} lifts committed-class entropy on majority of seeds; C3 frac_pre_ge2>0.3 on all 4 arms / majority seeds. PASS=C1 AND (C2 OR C3); 5-row interpretation grid (incl. branch-active vs branch-starved split on the C1+C3-only cell). 4 arms x 3 seeds (42/43/44) x 90 ep (P0 30 / P1 60) x 200 steps. EXPERIMENT_PURPOSE=diagnostic (excluded from confidence/conflict scoring); claim_ids=[MECH-341] recorded as context. Gates MECH-341 v3_pending clearance, the Q-054 re-issue (V3-EXQ-616a), and arc_062_rule_apprehension:GAP-B (V3-EXQ-543l cohort) at the governance-decision level. use_differentiable_cem NOT flipped (default False; SD-055 safety note preserved). Mac-pinned (DLAPTOP-4.local) for direct numerical comparability with the 614b/614c reference manifests (C1 regression guard). validate_experiments AST OK; dry-run smoke PASS (4 arms run, progress instrumentation correct M=90/verdict/boundary, emit_outcome sentinel wired); within-class plumbing verified (positive-temp arm shows n_within_class_sampled=10, committed_class_entropy populated). Phase3-queue snapshot race hazard mitigation per REE_Working/CLAUDE.md (post-commit dropped-file check).
